title: daucus littoralis var. glabra
intro: Daucus littoralis var. glabra, also known as Sea Carrot or Glabrous Sea Carrot, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Daucus littoralis var. glabra include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
